message:
test(connector_bundles): variant-dispatch Display coverage for 5 enums (16 paths)

- BundleTier: Tier2 + Tier3 (only Tier1 + Custom were tested)
- BundleCategory: 5 missing variants (ProjectManagement, Knowledge,
  Email, Monitoring, General) — only 3/8 were tested
- IngestionOutcome: Rejected variant with parameterized reason
- BundleValidationResult: all 4 Display paths (valid, valid+warnings,
  invalid, invalid+warnings) — zero coverage before
- BundleRegistryError: 4 untested variants (AlreadyExists,
  ValidationFailed, ConnectorNotInBundle, TrustInsufficient) — only
  NotFound + CapacityExceeded were tested

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
